languages.text: "Бойцы 32-го полка заняли предоставленные им казармы согласно Уставу, после чего перешли к регламентированной деятельности, лорд-капитан!" {n}Ведка ловит ваш взгляд и продолжает уже тише.{/n} "Я взяла большей частью тех, кто вместе со мной хотел покинуть Зарков. Они рады служить вам, рады лететь к звездам. Все вокруг пока чуждое и пугающее, но мы приспособимся. Мы всегда приспосабливаемся".

"The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."
languages.original_text: "Бойцы 32-го полка заняли предоставленные им казармы согласно Уставу, после чего перешли к регламентированной деятельности, лорд-капитан!" {n}Ведка ловит ваш взгляд и продолжает уже тише.{/n} "Я взяла большей частью тех, кто вместе со мной хотел покинуть Зарков. Они рады служить вам, рады лететь к звездам. Все вокруг пока чуждое и пугающее, но мы приспособимся. Мы всегда приспосабливаемся".

traits.locale_text: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I chose mostly those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is strange and frightening for now, but we will adapt. We always do."

"The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."
"Most of the Guardsmen are ones who dreamed of returning to the Imperium, so morale couldn't be higher. True, we still have a lot of work to do in adapting to... well, everything."

"The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I chose mostly those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is strange and frightening for now, but we will adapt. We always do."

"The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."

languages.text: 「ほとんどのグァーディアンは帝国への帰還を夢見ていた者たちなので、士気は最高です。確かに、まだ、あらゆるものに適応する作業はたくさん残されていますが」
languages.original_text: "Most of the Guardsmen are ones who dreamed of returning to the Imperium, so morale couldn't be higher. True, we still have a lot of work to do in adapting to... well, everything."

languages.text: "32. Alay askerleri Yasa'ya uygun olarak kendilerine tahsis edilen kışlalara yerleştiler ve planlanmış görevlerine başladılar Lord Kaptan!" {n}Vedka, gözünüzün içine bakıyor ve sesini alçaltarak devam ediyor.{/n} "Çoğunlukla benim gibi Zarkov'dan ayrılmak isteyenleri seçtim. Size hizmet etmekten, yıldızların arasında olmaktan memnunlar. Buradaki her şey hâlâ tuhaf ve korkutucu ama uyum sağlayacağız. Her zaman sağlarız."
languages.original_text: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."

traits.locale_text: "32. Alay askerleri Yasa'ya uygun olarak kendilerine tahsis edilen kışlalara yerleştiler ve planlanmış görevlerine başladılar Lord Kaptan!" {n}Vedka, gözünüzün içine bakıyor ve sesini alçaltarak devam ediyor.{/n} "Çoğunlukla benim gibi Zarkov'dan ayrılmak isteyenleri seçtim. Size hizmet etmekten, yıldızların arasında olmaktan memnunlar. Buradaki her şey hâlâ tuhaf ve korkutucu ama uyum sağlayacağız. Her zaman sağlarız."

languages.text: “第32团的士兵已按《法典》入驻分配的营房，并开始履行既定职责，舰长大人！”{n}薇德卡捕捉到你的目光，压低了声音继续道。{/n}“我挑选的大多是那些跟我一样想离开扎尔科夫的人。他们乐于为您效力，也乐于踏上这片星辰。这里的一切依然陌生又可怕，但我们会适应的。我们一向如此。”
languages.original_text: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."

traits.locale_text: “第32团的士兵已按《法典》入驻分配的营房，并开始履行既定职责，舰长大人！”{n}薇德卡捕捉到你的目光，压低了声音继续道。{/n}“我挑选的大多是那些跟我一样想离开扎尔科夫的人。他们乐于为您效力，也乐于踏上这片星辰。这里的一切依然陌生又可怕，但我们会适应的。我们一向如此。”

languages.text: "Die Soldaten des 32. Regiments haben die ihnen gemäß Kodex zugewiesenen Kasernen bezogen und ihren Dienst angetreten, Lord Captain." {n}Vedka sucht deinen Blick und fährt leiser fort.{/n} "Ich habe in erster Linie Leute ausgewählt, die Zarkov wie ich verlassen wollten. Sie sind glücklich, Euch zu dienen und zwischen den Sternen zu sein. Noch ist alles hier seltsam und beängstigend, aber wir werden uns daran gewöhnen. Das tun wir immer."
languages.original_text: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."

traits.locale_text: "Die Soldaten des 32. Regiments haben die ihnen gemäß Kodex zugewiesenen Kasernen bezogen und ihren Dienst angetreten, Lord Captain." {n}Vedka sucht deinen Blick und fährt leiser fort.{/n} "Ich habe in erster Linie Leute ausgewählt, die Zarkov wie ich verlassen wollten. Sie sind glücklich, Euch zu dienen und zwischen den Sternen zu sein. Noch ist alles hier seltsam und beängstigend, aber wir werden uns daran gewöhnen. Das tun wir immer."

languages.text: « Conformément au Code, les soldats du 32e régiment ont investi leurs casernes et ont entrepris leurs devoirs, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! » {n}Vedka croise votre regard et continue en chuchotant.{/n} « J'ai majoritairement choisi ceux qui, comme moi, voulaient quitter Zarkov. C'est un honneur pour eux de vous servir. Ils sont ravis d'être parmi les étoiles. Tout est étrange et terrifiant pour nous, mais nous nous adapterons. Comme toujours. »
languages.original_text: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."

traits.locale_text: « Conformément au Code, les soldats du 32e régiment ont investi leurs casernes et ont entrepris leurs devoirs, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! » {n}Vedka croise votre regard et continue en chuchotant.{/n} « J'ai majoritairement choisi ceux qui, comme moi, voulaient quitter Zarkov. C'est un honneur pour eux de vous servir. Ils sont ravis d'être parmi les étoiles. Tout est étrange et terrifiant pour nous, mais nous nous adapterons. Comme toujours. »

languages.text: «¡Los soldados del 32.º regimiento se han instalado en el barracón asignado de acuerdo con el Código y han comenzado a cumplir con sus deberes establecidos, Lord Capitán!». {n}La mirada de Vedka se cruza con la tuya y continúa en un tono más bajo.{/n} «He seleccionado principalmente a quienes, como yo, querían abandonar Zarkov. L{mf|e|a} servirán encantados y están agradecidos de encontrarse entre las estrellas. Todo es aún extraño e intimidante, pero nos adaptaremos. Siempre lo hacemos».
languages.original_text: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."

L{mf|e|a} servirán encantados y están agradecidos de encontrarse entre las estrellas. Todo es aún extraño e intimidante, pero nos adaptaremos. Siempre lo hacemos».
